name: Chocolate Truffles #3
recipeIngredient: 1 bar of unsweetened Chocolate, finely crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cream in a saucepan and heat until boiling.
2. Break the plain chocolate pieces into a bowl.
3. Pour the hot cream onto the chocolate, add the alcohol, and stir until the chocolate has melted.
4. Beat with an electric whisk until the mixture is cold and stiff (approximately 8-10 minutes).
5. Chill for 1 hour or until firm enough to shape.
6. Shape about 25 truffles using a melon baller or teaspoon.
7. Roll half of the truffles in cocoa powder and the other half in the crumbled, finely chopped chocolate bar.
